## How to test

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are **DCO signed-off** (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] One logical change; PR is focused and reasonably small
- [ ] No secrets, `.env` files, or `Mentees/` data included
- [ ] Docs / `CLAUDE.md` updated if behavior or rules changed
- [ ] Non-obvious decisions/learnings recorded in `TA-memory` (if any)
- [ ] If AI agents were used, I reviewed and tested the output and take ownership
